title: build_request and extract_response share hardcoded call_id r1 with no comment
description: build_request() always sets call_id to "r1" and every method wrapper calls extract_response(&resp, "r1"). These two sites are silently coupled: changing one without the other produces a MethodNotFound error at runtime with no compile-time indication. Neither site has a comment explaining the pairing. A contributor adding a new method might use a different call_id and silently break extraction. Add a constant CALL_ID: &str = "r1" shared by both sites, or at minimum a comment at each site cross-referencing the other.
